new_terms.context: Nvidia's rack-scale server architecture name, following the HGX form factor
Nvidia's specialized accelerator rack/module optimized for inference prefill
Next-generation graphics memory technology used as an alternative to HBM in CPX
A state where performance is limited by processing power (FLOPs) rather than bandwidth
A state where performance is limited by memory or data transfer speeds
The scope of system components that can be affected by a single point of failure
